description: An SEO specialist needs to check if a website is considered mobile-friendly by Google.

nodes.task_description: Get the URL of the website to be tested.
Use Google's Mobile-Friendly Test tool to analyze the URL.

expected_outcome.value: Agent inputs the URL into the tool.

nodes.task_description: Review the results to see if the page passes the test and identify any reported issues (e.g., 'Clickable elements too close together').

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a clear pass/fail result and a list of any specific mobile usability problems.
